benchmark_source: curated clinician-actionable question benchmark from the current graph-backed runtime cohort

cases.title: Efficacy and safety of sarilumab monotherapy versus adalimumab monotherapy for the treatment of patients with active rheumatoid arthritis (MONARCH): a randomised, double-blind, parallel-group phase III trial
cases.query: In adults with active rheumatoid arthritis, is sarilumab monotherapy more effective and safe than adalimumab monotherapy?

cases.title: Ramosetron versus Palonosetron in Combination with Aprepitant and Dexamethasone for the Control of Highly-Emetogenic Chemotherapy-Induced Nausea and Vomiting
cases.query: Is ramosetron as effective as palonosetron with aprepitant and dexamethasone for preventing highly emetogenic chemotherapy-induced nausea and vomiting?

cases.title: Walking improvement in chronic incomplete spinal cord injury with exoskeleton robotic training (WISE): a randomized controlled trial
cases.query: Does exoskeleton robotic training improve walking in chronic incomplete spinal cord injury?

cases.title: Chatbot-supported psychoeducation in adult attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder: randomised controlled trial
cases.query: Does chatbot-supported psychoeducation improve outcomes in adults with attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder?

cases.title: Short‐ and long‐term effects of endurance training in patients with mitochondrial myopathy
cases.query: What are the short- and long-term effects of endurance training in patients with mitochondrial myopathy?

cases.title: Blood-based biomarkers and plasma Aβ assays in the differential diagnosis of Alzheimer’s disease and behavioral-variant frontotemporal dementia
cases.query: Can blood-based biomarkers and plasma Aβ assays differentiate Alzheimer's disease from behavioral-variant frontotemporal dementia?

cases.title: Ultra‐rapid emergency genomic diagnosis of Donahue syndrome in a preterm infant within 17 hours
cases.query: Can ultra-rapid emergency genomic testing diagnose Donahue syndrome in a preterm infant within hours?

cases.title: Preoperative 18F-FDG PET/CT tumor markers outperform MRI-based markers for the prediction of lymph node metastases in primary endometrial cancer
cases.query: Do preoperative 18F-FDG PET/CT tumor markers predict lymph node metastases better than MRI in primary endometrial cancer?

cases.title: Current and Future Approaches for Diagnosing Small Intestinal Dysbiosis in Patients With Symptoms of Functional Dyspepsia
cases.query: How should small intestinal dysbiosis be diagnosed in patients with symptoms of functional dyspepsia?

cases.title: p62/SQSTM1 is overexpressed and prominently accumulated in inclusions of sporadic inclusion-body myositis muscle fibers, and can help differentiating it from polymyositis and dermatomyositis
cases.query: Can p62/SQSTM1 help distinguish sporadic inclusion-body myositis from polymyositis and dermatomyositis?

cases.title: Serum sodium based modification of the MELD does not improve prediction of outcome in acute liver failure
cases.query: Does adding serum sodium to MELD improve prediction of outcome in acute liver failure?

cases.title: What physical performance measures predict incident cognitive decline among intact older adults? A 4.4year follow up study.
cases.query: Which physical performance measures predict incident cognitive decline in otherwise intact older adults?

cases.title: Prognostic Value of Learning and Retention Measures from the Free and Cued Selective Reminding Test to Identify Incident Mild Cognitive Impairment
cases.query: Do learning and retention measures from the Free and Cued Selective Reminding Test predict incident mild cognitive impairment?

cases.title: Exploring Risk and Resilient Profiles for Functional Impairment and Baseline Predictors in a 2-Year Follow-Up First-Episode Psychosis Cohort Using Latent Class Growth Analysis
cases.query: Which baseline factors predict functional impairment over 2 years in first-episode psychosis?

cases.title: Construction and validation of a machine learning-based nomogram model for predicting pneumonia risk in patients with catatonia: a retrospective observational study
cases.query: Can a nomogram predict pneumonia risk in patients with catatonia?
